title: Y-9 trader
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Y-9 trader''' was a type of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] produced by [[Kaloth]].

==History==
Once it became outdated, the freighter class became popular as a [[Tramp freighter/Legends|tramp freighter]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] and other distant regions.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]''
